install: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y glslang-tools libvulkan-dev libwayland-bin libwayland-dev libxkbcommon-dev mesa-vulkan-drivers spirv-tools vulkan-tools wayland-protocols weston
start: mkdir -p "$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR" && chmod 700 "$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR" && if [ ! -S "$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/$WAYLAND_DISPLAY" ]; then nohup weston --backend=headless-backend.so --socket="$WAYLAND_DISPLAY" --idle-time=0 --width=1280 --height=720 >/tmp/weston.log 2>&1 & for _ in $(seq 1 50); do [ -S "$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/$WAYLAND_DISPLAY" ] && break; sleep 0.1; done; fi
